temperature Trigeminothalamic tract VP nucleus. Motor Pons. 9 Cutaneous distribution, not trigeminal! Back of the head : “Greater occipital” (Dorsal ramus, C2) …continued over the nape of the neck :Dorsal rami C3 onwards. Below the ear and mandible : Ventral rami of cervical nerves C3-4-5 : all the way beyond the clavicle. 	   Ophthalmic	   • Exits	  skull	  through	  superior	  orbital	  fissure	   • Eye
